entries.source: Chat Edit: 'LSP bridge integration	Connects the ASM engine to the IDE layer — enables real-time diagnostics, hover info, go-to-definition for the GGUF/hotpatch workspace. Makes the whole system usable as a dev tool, not just a binary.	Higher — requires protocol scaffolding (JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout), symbol table export, and client-side extension wiring'
